rules_evaluated.evidence: plan-mode-done-right.md L14: "Come to Module 2 without a surfaced task and you'll be scrambling to find one while the room is already in plan mode. Your call."

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Peek at the next module before adding a second exercise
Between-module reading appears in two places
Cross-module artefact contracts must be explicit at both ends
rules_evaluated.evidence: plan-mode-done-right.md L69 names the plan file handoff in body ("Ask Claude where it wrote the plan file, note the path; M3 reads it.") and earn-the-trust.md L12 consumes it ("The plan file Claude Code wrote during plan mode is what M3 reads (you noted the path at M2 close)."), but the identifier is the student-noted path — no stable convention named on either side. The producing prompt in M2 ({{prompt:push-back-on-the-plan-4}} or push-back-on-the-plan flow) does not guarantee a known path; M3's consumer relies on the student remembering it.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Either name a default convention (e.g., `./plan.md` or `~/.claude/plans/<slug>.md`) in M2's producing prompt and reference it from M3's prework, or document explicitly that the student's noted path is the contract and add a short note at M2 close instructing students to write the path down with the file name they chose.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Session boundaries and working directories are designed
Artefact-contract maintainer-block rows
rules_evaluated.evidence: plan-mode-done-right.md maintainer block (artefact-contracts table L131-134) lists only the Task-shaping rule file and the Personal rules update. The plan file produced by Phase 3 (`push-back-on-the-plan` exercise) and consumed by M3 (earn-the-trust.md L12: "The plan file Claude Code wrote during plan mode is what M3 reads") is not listed as a contract row.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Add a row to plan-mode-done-right.md artefact-contracts table: Plan file | student-noted path (Claude Code default location, captured at M2 close) | push-back-on-the-plan exercise (plan mode write) | M3 earn-the-trust Prework / Ex1 input.

Audit-discipline — walk M(N-1) close before flagging
Bring-or-scramble plain-stakes-line shape
rules_evaluated.evidence: M2's bring-to-M3 surface is the Pre-reads section (reading homework, not a bring-physical-thing surface), so the canonical bring-or-scramble line is not applicable for this pair. The M3 bring-to-M4 line at earn-the-trust.md L85 ("Come to Module 4 without having picked the task...") is canonical but evaluated under the M3→M4 pair (outside this audit set).
